summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was inferred. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise action is planned because this job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths. Open useful PRs are kept for maintainer review; exact unresolved review/security blockers are scoped to the affected refs.
